citizenship.name: Republic of Biesel
citizenship.description: An independent system within the core of human space, heavily tied to NanoTrasen and known for its large xeno population.

citizenship.name: Sol Alliance
citizenship.description: Once the juggernaut of human space, the Sol Alliance has declined significantly. Now a military junta, it controls the largest human military and holds xenophobic attitudes.

citizenship.name: Coalition of Colonies
citizenship.description: A loose confederation of frontier communities, ranging from colonial systems to super ships, bound together by shared independence from the major powers.

citizenship.name: Republic of Elyra
citizenship.description: The Serene Republic of Elyra, formed from early colonisation efforts. Its mixed relations with NanoTrasen stem from its possession of phoron deposits.

citizenship.name: Elyran Non-Citizen Person
citizenship.description: NCPs make up roughly a third of Elyra's population. Predominantly poor migrant labourers, they are excluded from most public systems.

citizenship.name: Eridani Federation
citizenship.description: A dystopian oligarchic republic dominated by mega-corporations, with a stark class divide between Corporates and Dregs.

citizenship.name: Empire of Dominia
citizenship.description: A heavily religious absolute monarchy ruled by Emperor Boleslaw Keeser. Autocratic and socio-economically stratified, heavily influenced by the Moroz Holy Tribunal.

citizenship.name: Nralakk Federation
citizenship.description: A centralised union of solar systems with its capital at Kal'lo on Qerrbalak. Widely regarded as offering the best quality of life in the galaxy, the Federation remains wary of humanity's development of AI technology.

citizenship.name: Izweski Hegemony
citizenship.description: A feudal empire ruled by the Izweski Clan from Moghes. The clan system is deeply entrenched in Unathi society, and the Hegemony continues to recover from an apocalyptic nuclear war.

citizenship.name: People's Republic of Adhomai
citizenship.description: The Hadiist faction of Adhomai. A centralised state implementing land reform and collectivisation across Tajaran territory.

citizenship.name: Democratic People's Republic of Adhomai
citizenship.description: Led by Purrjar Almrah Harrlala, the DPRA was formerly a militant insurgency now transitioning into a democratic nation.

citizenship.name: New Kingdom of Adhomai
citizenship.description: Ruled by the Njarir'Akhran noble line under King Vahzirthaamro Azunja. A constitutional monarchy seeking to restore traditional Tajaran governance.

citizenship.name: Free Tajaran Council
citizenship.description: The largest Tajaran community on Himeo, with origins in First Revolution-era revolutionaries. Founded on principles of radical equality.

citizenship.name: Zo'ra Hive
citizenship.description: The largest and most powerful Vaurca hive, and the first discovered by humanity. The Zo'ra believe themselves to be the alpha of the Vaurca and the face of their species. They are the most politically developed hive.

citizenship.name: K'lax Hive
citizenship.description: The second hive discovered by humanity. Formerly a client state of the Zo'ra, the K'lax are now a vassal of the Izweski Nation. They are the most technologically developed hive.

citizenship.name: C'thur Hive
citizenship.description: The third hive to develop relationships with other sophonts, and the only one still led by its original Hive Queen. Allied with the Nralakk Federation, the C'thur are the most economically developed hive.

citizenship.name: The Consortium of Hieroaetheria
citizenship.description: A loose confederation of Dionae groups across Mede. Progressive, multicultural, and inclusive of non-Dionae members.

citizenship.name: The Union of Gla'orr
citizenship.description: An autocratic and xenophobic Dionae state opposed to non-Dionae integration. More secular than the Ekane.

citizenship.name: The Eternal Republic of The Ekane
citizenship.description: An autocratic Dionae theocracy founded after Nralakk contact. Opposed to reform and inclusion, with the Eternal schools central to daily life.

citizenship.name: Golden Deep
citizenship.description: A collection of free synthetics united by the pursuit of power through currency and trade. Only recently revealed to humanity, their presence in Tau Ceti is limited to merchants and clerical industries.

citizenship.name: Ecclesiarchy of Orepit
citizenship.description: A theocratic regime under ARM-1DRIL, tracing its origins to the Church of the Trinary Perfection. A signatory to the Open Doors memorandum, allowing its populace to work and travel abroad.

citizenship.name: None
citizenship.description: Not a citizen of any state. A common situation for owned IPCs and Dionae.
